snippet: Families can complete the relevant application form (located on the Resources tab ) and submit it to their school, or the school can complete the form on their behalf and ensure the parent understands and signs the completed application form. Schools must check, verify and sign each application conﬁrming the information provided by parents/carers is correct including the availability of public transport and distance travelled. Note for Form 3: In most instances, public transport is free for students aged under 18. If the student has turned 18 years old, or the transport service is not covered under free public transport, an eligible student may be granted an allowance based on the most economical public transport fare only. Application for public transport travel must include evidence of ticket purchase. If public transport is also indicated on Form 4 and Form 5, include evidence of ticket purchase. Incorrect information may result in the application being declined or payment of the claim being delayed.
